name: Alaskan Spot Prawns with Cannellini Beans
recipeIngredient: 12 Alaska spot prawns with heads (any large fresh prawns can be substituted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the cannellini beans with water and soak overnight. Drain.
2. In a large saucepan, combine the soaked beans, carrot, celery, and onion. Add enough water to cover the ingredients. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until tender, about 1 hour.
3. Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a large saute pan. Add garlic, rosemary, and prawns. Cook for 2-3 minutes until the prawns are pink on one side.
4. Stir in the diced tomatoes, parsley, salt, and pepper. Continue cooking until the prawns turn pink and are cooked through, about 5 more minutes.
5. Serve immediately. Garnish with fresh rosemary and drizzle with extra virgin olive oil.
Yield: 2 servings
